name: Wedge
desc: Capital ships form the spearhead, escort ships trail behind. Maximum forward firepower — excellent for breaking through static enemy lines. Vulnerable to flanking attacks that expose the rear ships once the formation commits.

name: Line
desc: All ships abreast, presenting maximum combined broadside firepower. Excellent for sustained ranged exchanges. Prevents flanking but spreads fire across the enemy formation rather than concentrating it on priority targets.

name: Screen
desc: Escort ships form a forward screen protecting capital ships behind. Maximum point-defense coverage against Vorax Sporeshot salvos and missiles. Capitals are protected but contribute less direct fire while screening is active.
weak: Aggressive enemies who push through the screen

name: Encircle
desc: Fleet splits into two wings attempting to wrap around the enemy's flanks. Threatens devastating crossfire from multiple angles. High risk, high reward — if either wing is destroyed before the encirclement completes, the fleet loses.
weak: Concentrated enemy push through the center gap

name: Scatter
desc: All ships spread to maximum separation distance. Minimizes chain-reaction damage from Core Guardian Volatile Death events. Essential for Guardian engagements. Reduces fire concentration but ensures no single explosion destroys multiple ships.
weak: Focus fire, coordinated attacks from any direction
